productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Fashion Summer Black Tunics
description: CompositionRound neck smoky black tunic top in 100% viscose, with intricate embroidery around the neckline, buttoned slit on the neckline and mildly puffed ruffled sleevesFittingSlimWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron Get the boho chic look with this embroidered tunic top from the scullers women's collection. This tunic looks great when teamed with straight Fit denims, flip flops and loads of stacked bangles. A true tribute to the 70's fashion sense.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
